items.title: Five Notre Dame Football Photos for a Friday: Forgotten Running Backs
items.summary: Notre Dame just sent Jeremiyah Love and Jadarian Price to the NFL via the first round of the NFL Draft. items.title: Marcus Freeman is living in an absurd world
items.summary: College football is an absurd sport, and the lack of the triple option makes it even more so… let’s run it. items.title: Notre Dame Football finalizes 2027 schedule and is almost done with 2028
items.summary: Much has been made of Notre Dame’s 2026 football schedule, and the Irish have received some very public media and fan tongue lashings over the perceived strength of the 12 game slate (or lack there of). The schedule is what it is, and inside this new environment of the college football world — I’m not […]

items.title: No, Notre Dame should NOT play BYU every year
items.summary: The idea of Notre Dame and BYU playing annually as a new “Holy War” in college football isn’t anything new. items.title: TRIPLE THREAT: Ty Washington, Tae Johnson, and Tiki Hola
items.summary: Everyone loves to do a player countdown for Notre Dame as we face toward the college football season, but in all fairness, the offseason is much shorter than you think. items.title: What Happened the Last Time Notre Dame Played Rice?
items.summary: Looking ahead to a season full of familiar foes, we’re going to be taking some time this offseason to look at what happened the last time each of Notre Dame’s 2026 opponents met the Irish on the football field. Week two brings us to an opponent who isn’t scary, but also doesn’t feel totally safe […]
